race.description: 2026 Racing & Sports The Rising Sun Pace (G1)
race.comment: Boom mare CAPTAINS MISTRESS NZ (3) took her record since relocating to Australia to nine from 10 by beating Group 1 performers such as Don Hugo last start at Menangle. Kept fresh since but looked very good in a trial last week and scored a couple of big wins here at last year's carnival. Has the speed to take advantage of her good draw. That will see her tough to stop. Kiwi raider MARKETPLACE NZ (6) showed his class with a dominant victory here last week. A wider barrier poses more of a challenge but he possesses a powerful late burst so could be dangerous with the right run. NSW Derby winner HOLLYWOOD STRIP (2) took his record to 13 from 14 by beating older rivals last start. He is a big colt with the draw to do some damage. FINAL DEADLINE NZ (4) is hard to knock after taking his record this time in to three from three with a last-start Redcliffe Gold Cup win. Has won eight of his 11 attempts here. Player again from this draw. Tough barrier for FOX DAN (12) but he is talented and in form.

Live1.SchedulerNote: *[GROUP 1] Ladbrokes QLD Constellations Carnival - Prize Money: $300,000
